name: Monterey Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 10 oz frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the Crock-Pot.
2. Cook spaghetti in boiling water for 5 to 7 minutes. Drain.
3. In a small bowl, beat egg. Add to the Crock-Pot.
4. Add sour cream, Parmesan cheese, and garlic powder to the bowl with the egg.
5. Mix spaghetti, 2 cups Monterey Jack cheese, spinach, and half of the onions in the Crock-Pot.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
7. In the last 30 minutes of cooking, turn to High if using Low heat.
8. Add the remainder of Monterey Jack cheese and the onions to the top of the casserole.
9. Serve when cheese is melted.
Serves 6 to 8
